basis.reason: Use the smallest jsonargparse project surface that proves parser emission, env/config-aware adapter hooks, and pytest-facing verification source emission without widening to packaging or entrypoint build concerns.

in_scope: output contract influence on emitted parser behavior
out_of_scope: typed dataclass or class-based argument enrichment

required_source_surfaces.notes: Primary Python parser module emitted from canonical metadata.
Minimal pytest suite for the emitted parser surface.

downstream_build.working_directory_rule: run from the emitted project root containing parser.py and the generated pytest file
downstream_build.notes: The emitted parser module remains projection-only; runtime verification proves the emitted source contract without promoting it to authority.

success_conditions: the emitted parser expresses the canonical option and environment-binding semantics
pytest can exercise the minimal verification set when jsonargparse is available
notes: This contract is intentionally narrower than the full jsonargparse projection matrix.
Environment binding is preserved in the parser surface rather than dropped as in the first Bashly slice.
